content.full_text:
MAR-13-1992 08:05 FROM CITY OF SAN JACINTO TO 9191632272026 P.01/01

DEANNE STONE
CALIFORNIA FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
FAX 916 327 2026

THIS IS A FOLLOW UP TO THE CONVERSATION THAT WE HAD ON THURSDAY,MARCH 12.1992.
FOR MORE DETAILED INFORMATION,PLEASE REFER TO MY LETTER #92-23,ON THE NORTH
MOUNTAIN COMMUNICATIONS SITE.

TO THE BEST OF MY KNOWLEDGE,THESE ARE THE FACTS:

1. I DO NOT NOW OR HAVE I EVER HAD A WRITTEN CONTRACT OF ANY KIND WITH
ROGER MORGAN,INTERMAC,OR ANY OF HIS COMPANIES.

2.THE ONLY VERBAL UNDERSTANDING WITH ROGER MORGAN CONCERNED A COMMUNICATIONS
SITE(NOT LOCATED IN THE CITY OF SAN JACINTO) THAT HE HAD OFFERED FOR SALE.THE
UNDERSTANDING WAS THAT IF I HAD A CLIENT WHO MAY BE INTERESTED IN THE PURCHASE
OF THE SITE,THEN I COULD COLLECT A FINDERS FEE FROM MY CLIENT.

3. I NEVER HELD A LISTING ON THE PROPERTY.

4.MR HORGAN OFFERED THE SITE TO THE CITY OF SAN JACINTO,AND STAFF DID THE
REASEARCH AND MADE THE RECOMMENDATION TO THE COUNCIL.

5.I WAS NEVER TO HAVE RECIEVED ANY TYPE OF FEE,IF THE CITY PURCHASED THE SITE.

6. THE COUNCIL VOTED TO PURCHASE BUT DUE TO TECHNICAL REASONS THE
SALE NEVER ENTERED ESCROW,NOR DID THE SALE CONSUMATE.MR HORGAN WITHDREW HIS OFFER
TO THE CITY.THE CITY ACCEPTED,AND LATER MR MORGAN SOLD THE SITE TO ANOTHER PERSON
ALSO NOT A CLIENT OF MINE.

7. MR HORGAN HAS NEVER BEEN A CLIENT OF MINE NOR HAS HE BEEN A SOURCE OF
INCOME TO ME OR MY COMPANY,JIMCO BROADCAST CONSULTANTS.

MY QUESTION OF THE FPPC :

BECAUSE OF THIS PREVIOUS INVOLVEMENT AM I ABLE TO PARTICIPATE AND OR VOTE
ON A VARIETY OF OTHER PROJECTS THAT INVOLVE MR HORGAN AND HIS COMPANIES ?

DO I HAVE A CONFLICT OF INTEREST ?

JAMES C RICHARDS COUNCILMAN
CITY OF SAN JACINTO,CA.
MARCH 13.1992

P.O. BOX 489
SANJACINTO 92383
CA.

FROM RICE YOUNG PAC.INC.                                    3.13.1992  16:57        P. 2


DEANNE STONE
CALIFORNIA FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
FAX # 916 327 2026

PLEASE CONSIDER THIS REQUEST ALONG WITH MY LETTER DATED MARCH 13/1992/AND YOUR
FILE # 92-146\

THE REASON FOR REQUESTING A PHONE CALL AND A VERBAL RESPONSE IS BECAUSE ON TUESDAY
MARCH 17 COUNCIL AGENDA THERE WILL BE AN ITEM OF UNDERSTANDING TO WHICH ROGER MORGAN
AND THE CITY OF SAN JACINTO ARE BOTH PARTIES; I WOULD LIKE TO TAKE PART IN THE
DISCUSSION AND THE VOTE PROVIDED YOU FIND THAT I HAVE NO CONFLICT OF INTEREST
AS FAR AS MR MORGANS PROJECTS ARE CONCERNED\

PLEASE RESPOND NO LATER THAN 5 PM TUESDAY MARCH 17/1992 TO (714) 654-2445;
IF BY SOME CHANCE I MAY NOT BE HOME/PLEASE LEAVE THE MESSAGE ON THE RECORDER


                                          [signature]
                                          JAMES C. RICHARDS COUNCILMAN
                                          CITY OF SAN JACINTO/CA\

                                          3/13/92 .

embedding.qa_text: DEANNE STONE CALIFORNIA FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION FAX 916 327 2026 THIS IS A FOLLOW UP TO THE CONVERSATION THAT WE HAD ON THURSDAY, MARCH 12, 1992. FOR MORE DETAILED INFORMATION, PLEASE REFER TO MY LETTER #92-23, ON THE NORTH MOUNTAIN COMMUNICATIONS SITE. TO THE BEST OF MY KNOWLEDGE THESE ARE THE FACTS: 1. I DO NOT NOW OR HAVE I EVER HAD A WRITTEN CONTRACT OF ANY KIND WITH ROGER MORGAN, INTERMAC, OR ANY OF HIS COMPANIES. 2. THE ONLY VERBAL UNDERSTANDING WITH ROGER MORGAN CONCERNED A COMMUNICATIONS SITE (NOT LOCATED IN THE CITY OF SAN JACINTO) THAT HE HAD OFFERED FOR SALE. THE UNDERSTANDING WAS THAT IF I HAD A CLIENT WHO MAY BE INTERESTED IN THE PURCHASE OF THE SITE, THEN I COULD COLLECT A FINDERS FEE FROM MY CLIENT. 3. I NEVER HELD A LISTING ON THE PROPERTY. 4. MR. MORGAN OFFERED THE SITE TO THE CITY OF SAN JACINTO, AND STAFF DID THE RESEARCH AND MADE THE RECOMMENDATION TO THE COUNCIL. 5. I WAS NEVER TO HAVE RECEIVED ANY TYPE OF FEE, IF THE CITY PURCHASED THE SITE. 6. THE COUNCIL VOTED 3-1-1 TO PURCHASE BUT DUE TO TECHNICAL REASONS THE SALE NEVER ENTERED ESCROW, NOR DID THE SALE CONSUMMATE. MR. MORGAN WITHDREW HIS OFFER TO THE CITY; THE CITY ACCEPTED, AND LATER MR. MORGAN SOLD THE SITE TO ANOTHER PERSON ALSO NOT A CLIENT OF MINE. 7. MR. MORGAN HAS NEVER BEEN A CLIENT OF MINE NOR HAS HE BEEN A SOURCE OF INCOME TO ME OR MY COMPANY, JIMCO BROADCAST CONSULTANTS. MY QUESTION OF THE FPPC: BECAUSE OF THIS PREVIOUS INVOLVEMENT AM I ABLE TO PARTICIPATE AND OR VOTE ON A VARIETY OF OTHER PROJECTS THAT INVOLVE MR. MORGAN AND HIS COMPANIES? DO I HAVE A CONFLICT OF INTEREST? JAMES C RICHARDS, COUNCILMAN CITY OF SAN JACINTO, CA. MARCH 13, 1992 FROM RICE YOUNG PAC, INC. THE REASON FOR REQUESTING A PHONE CALL AND A VERBAL RESPONSE IS BECAUSE ON TUESDAY MARCH 17 COUNCIL AGENDA THERE WILL BE AN ITEM OF UNDERSTANDING TO WHICH ROGER MORGAN AND THE CITY OF SAN JACINTO ARE BOTH PARTIES; I WOULD LIKE TO TAKE PART IN THE DISCUSSION AND THE VOTE PROVIDED YOU FIND THAT I HAVE NO CONFLICT OF INTEREST AS FAR AS MR. MORGAN'S PROJECTS ARE CONCERNED. PLEASE RESPOND NO LATER THAN 5 PM TUESDAY MARCH 17/1992 TO (714) 654-2445. IF BY SOME CHANCE I MAY NOT BE HOME PLEASE LEAVE THE MESSAGE ON THE RECORDER. [Signature] JAMES C. RICHARDS COUNCILMAN CITY OF SAN JACINTO, CA 3/13/92
